events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Legend
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy birthday to the legendary Rolling Stones frontman.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens, changing music forever. Did 'Video Killed The Radio Star' really predict the future?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis's groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, launching them into global stardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Remembering the raw energy of Oasis's debut album 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your favourite track from this Britpop essential?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic moment of the 1960s counterculture, was held from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Which legendary performance stands out for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: We remember 'The King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who tragically passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of Elvis Presley. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Remembering hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur, who was tragically shot in Las Vegas in September 1996.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Today we remember the undeniable talent and impact of Tupac Shakur. A true voice of a generation, gone too soon.

events.title: Tribute to Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: A tribute to the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who tragically passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Innovator
angles.copy: Celebrating the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. His influence on guitar music is still felt decades later.

events.title: Celebrating The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road', featuring the legendary zebra crossing cover, was originally released on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The album that gave us *that* zebra crossing photo! Celebrating The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and trailblazer with The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Forever a rock and roll star.

events.title: Celebrating John Lennon's 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in October 1971.

angles.name: Peace Anthem
angles.copy: More than just a song, it's a message. Celebrating John Lennon's iconic 'Imagine'. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first iPod in October 2001, forever changing how we listen to music.

angles.name: Music Revolution
angles.copy: 25 years since Apple unveiled the iPod. It put 1,000 songs in your pocket and completely changed the game for music lovers.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme tunes, what's your favourite thing about 007?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: A tribute to The Beatles legend John Lennon, who was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering a Visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy legend and Monty Python star John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python or Fawlty Towers moment?
